New.description: Create a new AIRWING class object for a specific aircraft carrier unit.

AddSquadron.description: Add a squadron to the air wing.

NewPayload.description: Add a new payload to the airwing resources.

SetPayloadAmount.description: Set the number of payload available.

IncreasePayloadAmount.description: Increase or decrease the amount of available payloads. Unlimited playloads first need to be set to a limited number with the `SetPayloadAmount` function.

GetPayloadAmount.description: Get amount of payloads available for a given playload.

GetPayloadCapabilities.description: Get capabilities of a given playload.

AddPayloadCapability.description: Add a mission capability to an existing payload.

FetchPayloadFromStock.description: Fetch a payload from the airwing resources for a given unit and mission type.

ReturnPayloadFromAsset.description: Return payload from asset back to stock.

SetNumberCAP.description: Set number of CAP flights constantly carried out.

SetCapCloseRaceTrack.description: Set CAP close race track.We'll utilize the AUFTRAG PatrolRaceTrack instead of a standard race track orbit task.

SetCapStartTimeVariation.description: Set CAP mission start to vary randomly between Start end End seconds.

SetNumberTankerBoom.description: Set number of TANKER flights with Boom constantly in the air.

ShowPatrolPointMarkers.description: Set markers on the map for Patrol Points.

SetNumberTankerProbe.description: Set number of TANKER flights with Probe constantly in the air.

SetNumberAWACS.description: Set number of AWACS flights constantly in the air.

SetNumberRecon.description: Set number of RECON flights constantly in the air.

SetNumberRescuehelo.description: Set number of Rescue helo flights constantly in the air.

UpdatePatrolPointMarker.description: Update marker of the patrol point.

NewPatrolPoint.description: Create a new generic patrol point.

AddPatrolPointCAP.description: Add a patrol Point for CAP missions.

AddPatrolPointRecon.description: Add a patrol Point for RECON missions.

AddPatrolPointTANKER.description: Add a patrol Point for TANKER missions.

AddPatrolPointAWACS.description: Add a patrol Point for AWACS missions.

SetAirboss.description: Set airboss of this wing. He/she will take care that no missions are launched if the carrier is recovering.

SetTakeoffType.description: Set takeoff type. All assets of this airwing will be spawned with this takeoff type.

SetTakeoffCold.description: Set takeoff type cold (default). All assets of this squadron will be spawned with engines off (cold).

SetTakeoffHot.description: Set takeoff type hot. All assets of this squadron will be spawned with engines on (hot).

SetTakeoffAir.description: Set takeoff type air. All assets of this squadron will be spawned in air above the airbase.

SetLandingStraightIn.description: Set the aircraft of the AirWing to land straight in.

SetLandingForcePair.description: Set the aircraft of the AirWing to land in pairs for groups > 1 aircraft.

SetLandingRestrictPair.description: Set the aircraft of the AirWing to NOT land in pairs.

SetLandingOverheadBreak.description: Set the aircraft of the AirWing to land after overhead break.

SetOptionPreferVerticalLanding.description: [Helicopter] Set the aircraft of the AirWing to prefer vertical takeoff and landing.

SetDespawnAfterLanding.description: Set despawn after landing. Aircraft will be despawned after the landing event.

SetDespawnAfterHolding.description: Set despawn after holding. Aircraft will be despawned when they arrive at their holding position at the airbase.

onafterStart.description: Start AIRWING FSM.

CheckCAP.description: Check how many CAP missions are assigned and add number of missing missions.

CheckRECON.description: Check how many RECON missions are assigned and add number of missing missions.

CheckTANKER.description: Check how many TANKER missions are assigned and add number of missing missions.

CheckAWACS.description: Check how many AWACS missions are assigned and add number of missing missions.

CheckRescuhelo.description: Check how many Rescue helos are currently in the air.

GetTankerForFlight.description: Check how many AWACS missions are assigned and add number of missing missions.

SetUsingOpsAwacs.description: Add the ability to call back an Ops.AWACS#AWACS object with an FSM call "FlightOnMission(FlightGroup, Mission)".

RemoveUsingOpsAwacs.description: Remove the ability to call back an Ops.AWACS#AWACS object with an FSM call "FlightOnMission(FlightGroup, Mission)".

GetPayloadPeformance.description: Get payload performance for a given type of misson type.

GetPayloadMissionTypes.description: Get mission types a payload can perform.

New.description: Create a new ARMYGROUP class object.

SetPatrolAdInfinitum.description: Group patrols ad inifintum. If the last waypoint is reached, it will go to waypoint one and repeat its route.

GetClosestRoad.description: Get coordinate of the closest road.

GetClosestRoadDist.description: Get 2D distance to the closest road.

AddTaskFireAtPoint.description: Add a *scheduled* task to fire at a given coordinate.

AddTaskBarrage.description: Add a *scheduled* task to fire at a given coordinate.

AddTaskWaypointFireAtPoint.description: Add a *waypoint* task to fire at a given coordinate.

AddTaskCargoGroup.description: Add a *scheduled* task to transport group(s).

SetRetreatZones.description: Define a set of possible retreat zones.

AddRetreatZone.description: Add a zone to the retreat zone set.

SetSuppressionOn.description: Set suppression on. average, minimum and maximum time a unit is suppressed each time it gets hit.

IsHolding.description: Check if the group is currently holding its positon.

IsCruising.description: Check if the group is currently cruising.

IsOnDetour.description: Check if the group is currently on a detour.

IsCombatReady.description: Check if the group is ready for combat. I.e. not reaming, retreating, retreated, out of ammo or engaging.

onafterGotoWaypoint.description: On after "GotoWaypoint" event. Group will got to the given waypoint and execute its route from there.

AddWaypoint.description: Add an a waypoint to the route.

_InitGroup.description: Initialize group parameters. Also initializes waypoints if self.waypoints is nil.

FindNearestAmmoSupply.description: Find the neares ammo supply group within a given radius.

_Suppress.description: Suppress fire of the group by setting its ROE to weapon hold.

onbeforeUnsuppressed.description: Before "Recovered" event. Check if suppression time is over.

onafterUnsuppressed.description: After "Recovered" event. Group has recovered and its ROE is set back to the "normal" unsuppressed state. Optionally the group is flared green.

New.description: Create a new generic AUFTRAG object.

NewPATROL_RACETRACK.description: [AIR] Create an enhanced orbit race track mission. Planes will keep closer to the track.

NewORBIT.description: [AIR] Create an ORBIT mission, which can be either a circular orbit or a race-track pattern.

NewORBIT_CIRCLE.description: [AIR] Create an ORBIT mission, where the aircraft will go in a circle around the specified coordinate.

NewORBIT_RACETRACK.description: [AIR] Create an ORBIT mission, where the aircraft will fly a race-track pattern.

NewORBIT_GROUP.description: [AIR] Create an ORBIT mission, where the aircraft will fly a circular or race-track pattern over a given group or unit.

NewGCICAP.description: [AIR] Create a Ground Controlled CAP (GCICAP) mission. Flights with this task are considered for A2A INTERCEPT missions by the CHIEF class. They will perform a combat air patrol but not engage by

NewCASENHANCED.description: [AIR] Create a CASENHANCED mission. Group(s) will go to the zone and patrol it randomly.

NewFAC.description: [AIR, GROUND] Create a FAC mission. Group(s) will go to the zone and patrol it randomly and act as FAC for detected units.

NewSEADInZone.description: [AIR] Create a SEAD in Zone mission.

NewSTRIKE.description: [AIR] Create a STRIKE mission. Flight will attack the closest map object to the specified coordinate.

NewBOMBING.description: [AIR] Create a BOMBING mission. Flight will drop bombs a specified coordinate.

NewSTRAFING.description: [AIR] Create a STRAFING mission. Assigns a point on the ground for which the AI will do a strafing run with guns or rockets.

NewGROUNDESCORT.description: [AIR/HELO] Create a GROUNDESCORT (or FOLLOW) mission. Helo will escort a ground group and automatically engage certain target types.

NewESCORT.description: [AIR] Create an ESCORT (or FOLLOW) mission. Flight will escort another group and automatically engage certain target types.

NewRESCUEHELO.description: [AIR ROTARY] Create a RESCUE HELO mission.

NewTROOPTRANSPORT.description: [AIR ROTARY, GROUND] Create a TROOP TRANSPORT mission.

NewCARGOTRANSPORT.description: [AIR ROTARY] Create a CARGO TRANSPORT mission.

NewOPSTRANSPORT.description: [AIR, GROUND, NAVAL] Create a OPS TRANSPORT mission.

NewARTY.description: [GROUND, NAVAL] Create an ARTY mission ("Fire at point" task).

NewBARRAGE.description: [GROUND, NAVAL] Create an BARRAGE mission. Assigned groups will move to a random coordinate within a given zone and start firing into the air.

NewPATROLZONE.description: [AIR, GROUND, NAVAL] Create a PATROLZONE mission. Group(s) will go to the zone and patrol it randomly.

NewCAPTUREZONE.description: [AIR, GROUND, NAVAL] Create a CAPTUREZONE mission. Group(s) will go to the zone and patrol it randomly.

NewGROUNDATTACK.description: [GROUND] Create a GROUNDATTACK mission. Ground group(s) will go to a target object and attack at their own discretion.

NewNAVALENGAGEMENT.description: [NAVAL] Create a NAVALENGAGEMENT mission. Naval group(s) will go to a target object and attack at their own discretion.

NewRECON.description: [AIR, GROUND, NAVAL] Create a RECON mission.

NewALERT5.description: [AIR] Create an ALERT 5 mission. Aircraft will be spawned uncontrolled and wait for an assignment. You must specify one mission type which is performed.

NewONGUARD.description: [GROUND, NAVAL] Create an ON GUARD mission.

_NewRELOCATECOHORT.description: [PRIVATE, AIR, GROUND, NAVAL] Create a mission to relocate all cohort assets to another LEGION.

NewNOTHING.description: [GROUND, NAVAL] Create a mission to do NOTHING.

NewARMOREDGUARD.description: [GROUND] Create an ARMORED ON GUARD mission.

NewFromTarget.description: Create a mission to attack a TARGET object.

_DetermineAuftragType.description: Create a mission to attack a group. Mission type is automatically chosen from the group category.

NewAUTO.description: Create a mission to attack a group. Mission type is automatically chosen from the group category.

SetTime.description: Set mission start and stop time.

SetDuration.description: Set time how long the mission is executed. Once this time limit has passed, the mission is cancelled.

SetTeleport.description: Set that mission assets are teleported to the mission execution waypoint.

SetReturnToLegion.description: [LEGION, COMMANDER, CHIEF] Set whether assigned assets return to their legion once the mission is over. This is only applicable to army and navy groups, *i.e.* aircraft

SetPushTime.description: Set mission push time. This is the time the mission is executed. If the push time is not passed, the group will wait at the mission execution waypoint.

SetPriority.description: Set mission priority and (optional) urgency. Urgent missions can cancel other running missions.

SetRepeat.description: [LEGION, COMMANDER, CHIEF] Set how many times the mission is repeated. Only valid if the mission is handled by a LEGION (AIRWING, BRIGADE, FLEET) or higher level.

SetRepeatDelay.description: [LEGION, COMMANDER, CHIEF] Set the repeat delay in seconds after a mission is successful/failed. Only valid if the mission is handled by a LEGION (AIRWING, BRIGADE, FLEET) or higher level.

SetRepeatOnFailure.description: [LEGION, COMMANDER, CHIEF] Set how many times the mission is repeated if it fails. Only valid if the mission is handled by a LEGION (AIRWING, BRIGADE, FLEET) or higher level.

SetRepeatOnSuccess.description: [LEGION, COMMANDER, CHIEF] Set how many times the mission is repeated if it was successful. Only valid if the mission is handled by a LEGION (AIRWING, BRIGADE, FLEET) or higher level.

SetReinforce.description: [LEGION, COMMANDER, CHIEF] Set that mission assets get reinforced if their number drops below the minimum number of required assets of the mission (*c.f.* SetRequiredAssets() function).

SetRequiredAssets.description: [LEGION, COMMANDER, CHIEF] Define how many assets are required to do the job. Only used if the mission is handled by a LEGION (AIRWING, BRIGADE, ...) or higher level.

GetRequiredAssets.description: [LEGION, COMMANDER, CHIEF] Get number of required assets.

SetAssetsStayAlive.description: [LEGION, COMMANDER, CHIEF] Set that only alive (spawned) assets are considered.

SetRequiredEscorts.description: [LEGION, COMMANDER, CHIEF] Define how many assets are required that escort the mission assets.

SetEnableMarkers.description: Enable markers, which dispay the mission status on the F10 map.

SetWeaponType.description: Set weapon type used for the engagement.

SetWeaponExpend.description: Set number of weapons to expend.

SetEngageAsGroup.description: Set whether target will be attack as group.

SetEngageAltitude.description: Set engage altitude. This is the altitude passed to the DCS task. In the ME it is the tickbox ALTITUDE ABOVE.

SetEngageDetected.description: Enable to automatically engage detected targets.

SetMissionAltitude.description: Set mission altitude. This is the altitude of the waypoint create where the DCS task is executed.

SetMissionSpeed.description: Set mission speed. That is the speed the group uses to get to the mission waypoint.

SetMissionRange.description: Set max mission range. Only applies if the AUFTRAG is handled by an AIRWING or CHIEF. This is the max allowed distance from the airbase to the target.

SetOpsTransport.description: Attach OPS transport to the mission. Mission assets will be transported before the mission is started at the OPSGROUP level.

GetOpsTransport.description: Get the attach OPS transport of the mission.

SetRequiredTransport.description: [LEGION, COMMANDER, CHIEF] Attach OPS transport to the mission. Mission assets will be transported before the mission is started at the OPSGROUP level.

AddTransportCarriers.description: Add carriers for a transport of mission assets.

SetRequiredAttribute.description: [LEGION, COMMANDER, CHIEF] Set required attribute(s) the assets must have.

SetRequiredProperty.description: [LEGION, COMMANDER, CHIEF] Set required property or properties the assets must have.

SetRequiredCarriers.description: [LEGION, COMMANDER, CHIEF] Set number of required carrier groups if an OPSTRANSPORT assignment is required.

SetProhibitAfterburner.description: Set that (jet) aircraft are generally not allowed to use afterburner. Default is use of afterburner is allowed.

SetAllowAfterburner.description: Set that (jet) aircraft are generally allowed to use afterburner. Default is use of afterburner is allowed.

SetProhibitAfterburnerExecutePhase.description: Set that (jet) aircraft are not allowed to use afterburner in mission execution phase. Default is use of afterburner is allowed.

SetAllowAfterburnerExecutePhase.description: Set that (jet) aircraft are allowed to use afterburner in mission execution phase. Default is use of afterburner is allowed.

AssignCohort.description: [LEGION, COMMANDER, CHIEF] Assign a legion cohort to the mission. Only these cohorts will be considered for the job.

AssignLegion.description: [LEGION, COMMANDER, CHIEF] Assign a legion to the mission. Only cohorts of this legion will be considered for the job. You can assign multiple legions.

AssignSquadrons.description: [LEGION, COMMANDER, CHIEF] Assign airwing squadron(s) to the mission. Only these squads will be considered for the job.

AssignTransportLegion.description: [LEGION, COMMANDER, CHIEF] Assign a transport Legion.

AssignTransportCohort.description: [LEGION, COMMANDER, CHIEF] Assign a transport cohort.

AssignEscortLegion.description: [LEGION, COMMANDER, CHIEF] Add an escort Legion.

AssignEscortCohort.description: [LEGION, COMMANDER, CHIEF] Assign an escort cohort.

SetROE.description: Set Rules of Engagement (ROE) for this mission.

SetROT.description: Set Reaction on Threat (ROT) for this mission.

SetAlarmstate.description: Set alarm state for this mission.

SetEPLRS.description: Set EPLRS datalink setting for this mission.

SetEmission.description: Set emission setting for this mission.

SetInvisible.description: Set invisibility setting for this mission.

SetImmortal.description: Set immortality setting for this mission.

SetRadio.description: Set radio frequency and modulation for this mission.

SetTACAN.description: Set TACAN beacon channel and Morse code for this mission.

SetICLS.description: Set ICLS beacon channel and Morse code for this mission.

SetEvaluationTime.description: Set time interval between mission done and success/failure evaluation.

GetCasualties.description: Get casualties, *i.e.* number of own units that died during this mission.

GetKills.description: Get kills, i.e. number of units that were destroyed by assets of this mission.

AddRequiredPayload.description: Add a required payload for this mission. Only these payloads will be used for this mission. If they are not available, the mission cannot start. Only available for use with an AIRWING.

AddOpsGroup.description: Add a Ops group to the mission.

DelOpsGroup.description: Remove an Ops group from the mission.

IsQueued.description: Check if mission is QUEUED at a LEGION mission queue.

IsRequested.description: Check if mission is REQUESTED. The mission request out to the WAREHOUSE.

IsScheduled.description: Check if mission is SCHEDULED. The first OPSGROUP has been assigned.

IsStarted.description: Check if mission is STARTED. The first OPSGROUP is on its way to the mission execution waypoint.

IsExecuting.description: Check if mission is EXECUTING. The first OPSGROUP has reached the mission execution waypoint and is not executing the mission task.

IsSuccess.description: Check if mission was a success.

IsOver.description: Check if mission is over. This could be state DONE, CANCELLED, SUCCESS, FAILED.

IsNotRepeatable.description: Check if mission is NOT repeatable.

IsNotOver.description: Check if mission is NOT over.

IsAircraft.description: Check if mission is for aircarft (airplanes and/or helicopters).

IsAirplane.description: Check if mission is for airplanes.

IsHelicopters.description: Check if mission is for helicopters.

IsGround.description: Check if mission is for ground units.

IsNaval.description: Check if mission is for naval units.

IsReadyToGo.description: Check if mission is ready to be started.

IsReadyToCancel.description: Check if mission is ready to be cancelled.

IsReadyToPush.description: Check if mission is ready to be pushed.

EvalConditionsAll.description: Check if all given condition are true.

EvalConditionsAny.description: Check if any of the given conditions is true.

Evaluate.description: Evaluate mission outcome - success or failure.

SetGroupWaypointCoordinate.description: Set mission (ingress) waypoint coordinate for OPS group.

SetIngressCoordinate.description: [Air] Set mission (ingress) waypoint coordinate for FLIGHT group.

GetGroupWaypointCoordinate.description: Get mission (ingress) waypoint coordinate of OPS group

SetGroupWaypointTask.description: Set mission waypoint task for OPS group.

GetGroupWaypointTask.description: Get mission waypoint task of OPS group.

SetGroupWaypointIndex.description: Set mission (ingress) waypoint UID for OPS group.

GetGroupWaypointIndex.description: Get mission (ingress) waypoint UID of OPS group.

SetGroupEgressWaypointUID.description: Set Egress waypoint UID for OPS group.

GetGroupEgressWaypointUID.description: Get Egress waypoint UID of OPS group.

CheckGroupsDone.description: Check if all groups are done with their mission (or dead).

onafterQueued.description: On after "Queue" event. Mission is added to the mission queue of a LEGION.

onafterScheduled.description: On after "Schedule" event. Mission is added to the mission queue of an OPSGROUP.

onafterCancel.description: On after "Cancel" event. Cancells the mission.

onafterStop.description: On after "Stop" event. Remove mission from LEGION and OPSGROUP mission queues.

_TargetFromObject.description: Create target data from a given object.

GetObjective.description: Get mission objective object. Could be many things depending on the mission type.

GetAssetByName.description: Get asset by its spawn group name.

CountOpsGroups.description: Count alive OPS groups assigned for this mission.

CountOpsGroupsInStatus.description: Count OPS groups in a certain status.

GetMissionTypesText.description: Get coordinate of target. First unit/group of the set is used.

SetMissionWaypointCoord.description: [NON-AIR] Set the mission waypoint coordinate from where the mission is executed. Note that altitude is set via `:SetMissionAltitude`.

SetMissionWaypointRandomization.description: Set randomization of the mission waypoint coordinate. Each assigned group will get a random ingress coordinate, where the mission is executed.

SetMissionEgressCoord.description: Set the mission egress coordinate. This is the coordinate where the assigned group will go once the mission is finished.

SetMissionIngressCoord.description: [Air] Set the mission ingress coordinate. This is the coordinate where the assigned group will fly before the actual mission coordinate.

SetMissionHoldingCoord.description: [Air] Set the mission holding coordinate. This is the coordinate where the assigned group will fly before the actual mission execution starts. Do not forget to add a push condition, too!

GetMissionEgressCoord.description: Get the mission egress coordinate if this was defined.

GetMissionIngressCoord.description: Get the mission ingress coordinate if this was defined.

GetMissionHoldingCoord.description: Get the mission holding coordinate if this was defined.

_GetMissionWaypointCoordSet.description: Get coordinate which was set as mission waypoint coordinate.

GetMissionWaypointCoord.description: Get coordinate of target. First unit/group of the set is used.

_GetRequestID.description: Get request ID from legion this mission requested assets from

_GetRequest.description: Get request from legion this mission requested assets from.

_SetRequestID.description: Set request ID from legion this mission requested assets from

_IsReinforcing.description: Check if reinforcement is still ongoing.

GetDCSMissionTask.description: Get DCS task table for the given mission.

_GetDCSAttackTask.description: Get DCS task table for an attack group or unit task.

GetMissionTaskforMissionType.description: Get DCS task table for an attack group or unit task.

CheckMissionType.description: Checks if a mission type is contained in a table of possible types.

CheckMissionCapability.description: Check if a mission type is contained in a list of possible capabilities.

CheckMissionCapabilityAny.description: Check if a mission type is contained in a list of possible capabilities.

CheckMissionCapabilityAll.description: Check if a mission type is contained in a list of possible capabilities.

SetTacticalRadios.description: [User] Set the tactical information option, create 10 radio channels groups can subscribe and get Bogey Dope on a specific frequency automatically. You need to set up SRS first before using this!

SetLocale.description: [User] Set locale for localization. Defaults to "en"

SetMaxMissionRange.description: [User] Set the max mission range flights can be away from their home base.

AddFrequencyAndModulation.description: [User] Add additional frequency and modulation for AWACS SRS output.

SetAsGCI.description: [User] Set this instance to act as GCI TACS Theater Air Control System

SetBullsEyeAlias.description: [User] Change the bulls eye alias for AWACS callout. Defaults to "Rock"

SetReassignmentPause.description: [User] Change number of seconds AWACS waits until a Player is re-assigned a different task. Defaults to 180.

SuppressScreenMessages.description: [User] Do not show messages on screen

ZipLip.description: [User] Do not show messages on screen, no extra calls for player guidance, use short callsigns etc.

SetCustomCallsigns.description: [User] For CAP flights: Replace ME callsigns with user-defined callsigns for use with TTS and on-screen messaging

SetRadarBlur.description: [User] Set AWACS Radar Blur - the radar contact count per group/cluster will be distored up or down by this number percent. Defaults to 15 in Modern Era and 25 in Cold War.

SetColdWar.description: [User] Set AWACS to Cold War standards - ROE to VID, ROT to Passive (bypass and escape). Radar blur 25%.

SetModernEra.description: [User] Set AWACS to Modern Era standards - ROE to BVR, ROT to defensive (evade fire). Radar blur 15%.

SetModernEraDefensive.description: [User] Set AWACS to Modern Era standards - ROE to IFF, ROT to defensive (evade fire). Radar blur 15%.

SetModernEraAggressive.description: [User] Set AWACS to Modern Era standards - ROE to BVR, ROT to return fire. Radar blur 15%.

SetPolicingModern.description: [User] Set AWACS to Policing standards - ROE to VID, ROT to Lock (bypass and escape). Radar blur 15%.

SetPolicingColdWar.description: [User] Set AWACS to Policing standards - ROE to VID, ROT to Lock (bypass and escape). Radar blur 25%.

SetPlayerGuidance.description: [User] Set AWACS Player Guidance - influences missile callout and the "New" label in group callouts.

SetInterceptTimeline.description: [User] Set AWACS intercept timeline support distance.

SetAdditionalZone.description: [User] Set additional defensive zone, e.g. the zone behind the FEZ to also be defended

SetRejectionZone.description: [User] Set rejection zone, e.g. a border of a foreign country. Detected bogeys in here won't be engaged.

AddCorridorZone.description: Function to add one corridor zone.

SetCorridorZoneFloorAndCeiling.description: Function to set corridor zone floor and ceiling in FEET.

SetCorridorZoneFloorAndCeilingMeters.description: Function to set corridor zone floor and ceiling in METERS.

DrawFEZ.description: [User] Draw a line around the FEZ on the F10 map.

SetCustomAWACSCallSign.description: [User] Set AWACS custom callsigns for TTS

AddGroupToDetection.description: [User] Add a radar GROUP object to the INTEL detection SET_GROUP

SetSRSVoiceCAP.description: [User] Set AWACS Voice Details for AI CAP Planes  - SRS TTS - see @{Sound.SRS} for details

_MessageVector.description: [Internal] Message a vector BR to a position

_ToStringBULLS.description: [Internal] Return Bullseye BR for Alpha Check etc, returns e.g. "Rock 021, 16" ("Rock" being the set BE name)

_ToStringBullsTTS.description: [Internal] Change Bullseye string to be TTS friendly,  "Bullseye 021, 16" returns e.g. "Bulls eye 0 2 1. 1 6"

_GetManagedGrpID.description: [Internal] Check if a group has checked in

SetCallSignOptions.description: [User] Set player callsign options for TTS output. See @{Wrapper.Group#GROUP.GetCustomCallSign}() on how to set customized callsigns.

_GetIdlePilots.description: [Internal] Select pilots available for tasking, return AI and Human

_TargetSelectionProcess.description: [Internal] Select max 3 targets for picture, bogey dope etc

_DeleteAnchorStackFromMarker.description: [Internal] AWACS Delete a new Anchor Stack from a Marker - only works if no assignments are on the station

_MoveAnchorStackFromMarker.description: [Internal] AWACS Move a new Anchor Stack from a Marker

_CreateAnchorStackFromMarker.description: [Internal] AWACS Create a new Anchor Stack from a Marker - this then is the preferred station for players

_CreateAnchorStack.description: [Internal] AWACS Create a new Anchor Stack

_GetFreeAnchorStack.description: [Internal] AWACS get free anchor stack for managed groups

_AssignAnchorToID.description: [Internal] AWACS Assign Anchor Position to a Group

_StartIntel.description: [Internal] Start INTEL detection when we reach the AWACS Orbit Zone

_GetBlurredSize.description: [Internal] Get blurred size of group or cluster

_GetThreatLevelText.description: [Internal] Get threat level as clear test

_GetBRAfromBullsOrAO.description: [Internal] Get BR text for TTS - ie "Rock 214, 24 miles" and TTS "Rock 2 1 4, 24 miles"

_CreateTaskForGroup.description: [Internal] Register Task for Group by GID

_ReadAssignedTaskFromGID.description: [Internal] Read registered Task for Group by its ID

_ReadAssignedGroupFromTID.description: [Internal] Read assigned Group from a TaskID

_MessageAIReadyForTasking.description: [Internal] Create radio entry to tell players that CAP is on station in Anchor

AddCAPAirWing.description: [User] Add another AirWing for AI CAP Flights under management

_GetAliveOpsGroupFromTable.description: [Internal] Check for alive OpsGroup from Mission OpsGroups table

_CheckAICAPOnStation.description: [Internal] Check Enough AI CAP on Station

_AssignPilotToTarget.description: [Internal] Assign a Pilot to a target

onafterStart.description: [Internal] onafterStart

New.description: Create a new BRIGADE class object.

AddPlatoon.description: Add a platoon to the brigade.

SetRetreatZones.description: Define a set of retreat zones.

onafterStart.description: Start BRIGADE FSM.

New.description: Create a new CHIEF object and start the FSM.

SetAirToAny.description: Set this to be an air-to-any dispatcher, i.e. engaging air, ground and naval targets. This is the default anyway.

SetAirToAir.description: Set this to be an air-to-air dispatcher.

SetAirToGround.description: Set this to be an air-to-ground dispatcher, i.e. engage only ground units

SetAirToSea.description: Set this to be an air-to-sea dispatcher, i.e. engage only naval units.

SetAirToSurface.description: Set this to be an air-to-surface dispatcher, i.e. engaging ground and naval groups.

SetThreatLevelRange.description: Set a threat level range that will be engaged. Threat level is a number between 0 and 10, where 10 is a very dangerous threat.

CreateResource.description: Create a new resource list of required assets.

AddToResource.description: Add mission type and number of required assets to resource list.

AddTransportToResource.description: Define which assets will be transported and define the number and attributes/properties of the cargo carrier assets.

DeleteFromResource.description: Delete mission type from resource list. All running missions are cancelled.

SetResponseOnTarget.description: Set number of assets requested for detected targets.

_GetAssetsForTarget.description: Add mission type and number of required assets to resource.

SetLimitMission.description: Set limit for number of total or specific missions to be executed simultaniously.

AddAirwing.description: Add an AIRWING to the chief's commander.

AddBrigade.description: Add a BRIGADE to the chief's commander.

AddFleet.description: Add a FLEET to the chief's commander.

AddLegion.description: Add a LEGION to the chief's commander.

AddOpsTransport.description: Add transport to transport queue of the COMMANDER.

IsTarget.description: Check if a TARGET is already in the queue.

SetStrategicZoneResourceEmpty.description: Set the resource list of missions and assets employed when the zone is empty.

GetStrategicZoneResourceEmpty.description: Get the resource list of missions and assets employed when the zone is empty.

GetStrategicZoneResourceOccupied.description: Get the resource list of missions and assets employed when the zone is occupied by the enemy.

AddCapZone.description: Add a CAP zone. Flights will engage detected targets inside this zone.

SetBorderZones.description: Set border zone set, defining your territory.

AddBorderZone.description: Add a zone defining your territory.

RemoveBorderZone.description: Remove a border zone defining your territory.

AllowGroundTransport.description: Allow chief to use GROUND units for transport tasks. Helicopters are still preferred, and be aware there's no check as of now

ForbidGroundTransport.description: Forbid chief to use GROUND units for transport tasks. Restrict to Helicopters. This is the default

IsPassive.description: Check if current strategy is passive.

IsDefensive.description: Check if current strategy is defensive.

IsOffensive.description: Check if current strategy is offensive.

IsAgressive.description: Check if current strategy is aggressive.

IsTotalWar.description: Check if current strategy is total war.

onafterStart.description: On after Start event.

CheckTargetQueue.description: Check target queue and assign ONE valid target by adding it to the mission queue of the COMMANDER.

_CheckMissionLimit.description: Check if limit of missions has been reached.

CheckGroupInBorder.description: Check if group is inside our border.

CheckGroupInConflict.description: Check if group is in a conflict zone.

CheckGroupInAttack.description: Check if group is in a attack zone.

CheckGroupInZones.description: Check if group is inside a zone.

CheckTargetInZones.description: Check if group is inside a zone.

_GetMissionPerformanceFromTarget.description: Get mission performance for a given TARGET.

_GetMissionTypeForGroupAttribute.description: Get mission performances for a given Group Attribute.

RecruitAssetsForZone.description: Recruit assets for a given OPS zone.

_FilterAssets.description: Filter assets, which have certain categories, attributes and/or properties.

_CheckAssetAttributes.description: Check if a given asset has certain attribute(s).

_CheckAssetCategories.description: Check if a given asset has certain categories.

_CheckAssetProperties.description: Check if a given asset has certain properties.

CanMission.description: Checks whether or not any of the legions con run a mission.

COHORT.description:
encompassed all characteristics of SQUADRONs, PLATOONs and FLOTILLAs.
--
--

New.description: Create a new COHORT object and start the FSM.

SetLivery.description: Set livery painted on all cohort units.

SetSkill.description: Set skill level of all cohort team members.

SetTurnoverTime.description: Set turnover and repair time. If an asset returns from a mission, it will need some time until the asset is available for further missions.

SetRadio.description: Set radio frequency and modulation the cohort uses.

SetGrouping.description: Set number of units in groups.

AddMissionCapability.description: Set mission types this cohort is able to perform.

GetMissionTypes.description: Get mission types this cohort is able to perform.

GetMissionCapabilities.description: Get mission capabilities of this cohort.

GetMissionPeformance.description: Get mission performance for a given type of misson.

SetMissionRange.description: Set max mission range. Only missions in a circle of this radius around the cohort base are executed.

RemoveAssets.description: Remove assets from pool. Not that assets must not be spawned or already reserved or requested.

GetCallsign.description: Create a callsign for the asset.

GetModex.description: Create a modex for the asset.

AddTacanChannel.description: Add TACAN channels to the cohort. Note that channels can only range from 1 to 126.

AddWeaponRange.description: Add a weapon range for ARTY missions (@{Ops.Auftrag#AUFTRAG}).

GetWeaponData.description: Get weapon range for given bit type.

onafterStart.description: On after Start event. Starts the FLIGHTGROUP FSM and event handlers.

CanMission.description: Check if there is a cohort that can execute a given mission.

CountAssets.description: Count assets in legion warehouse stock.

GetRepairTime.description: Get the time an asset needs to be repaired.

GetMissionRange.description: Get max mission range. We add the largest weapon range, e.g. for arty or naval if weapon data is available.

IsRepaired.description: Checks if a mission type is contained in a table of possible types.

CheckAttribute.description: Check if the cohort attribute matches the given attribute(s).

_MissileCategoryName.description: Returns a name of a missile category.

SetLimitMission.description: Set limit for number of total or specific missions to be executed simultaniously.

AddAirwing.description: Add an AIRWING to the commander.

AddBrigade.description: Add a BRIGADE to the commander.

AddFleet.description: Add a FLEET to the commander.

AddLegion.description: Add a LEGION to the commander.

RemoveLegion.description: Remove a LEGION to the commander.

IsTarget.description: Check if a TARGET is already in the queue.

IsMission.description: Check if this mission is already in the queue.

RelocateCohort.description: Relocate a cohort to another legion.

onafterStart.description: On after Start event. Starts the FLIGHTGROUP FSM and event handlers.

onafterMissionAssign.description: On after "MissionAssign" event. Mission is added to a LEGION mission queue and already requested. Needs assets to be added to the mission already.

onafterTransportAssign.description: On after "TransportAssign" event. Transport is added to a LEGION transport queue.

CheckTargetQueue.description: Check target queue and assign ONE valid target by adding it to the mission queue of the COMMANDER.

CheckMissionQueue.description: Check mission queue and assign ONE planned mission.

SetMaxMissionsAssignPerCycle.description: Warning: Increasing this value will increase the number of missions started per iteration and thus may lead to performance issues if too many missions are started at once.

CanMission.description: Checks whether or not any of the legions con run a mission.

RecruitAssetsForMission.description: Recruit assets for a given mission.

CountMissions.description: Count assets of all assigned legions.

GetAssetsOnMission.description: Get assets on given mission or missions.

New.description: Create a new FLEET class object.

AddFlotilla.description: Add a flotilla to the fleet.

SetPathfinding.description: Set pathfinding for all spawned naval groups.

SetRetreatZones.description: Define a set of retreat zones.

onafterStart.description: Start FLEET FSM.

New.description: Create a new FLIGHTCONTROL class object for an associated airbase.

SetRadioOnlyIfPlayers.description: Limit radio transmissions only if human players are registered at the airbase.

SetTransmitOnlyWithPlayers.description: Set whether to only transmit TTS messages if there are players on the server.

SwitchSubtitlesOn.description: Set subtitles to appear on SRS TTS messages.

SwitchSubtitlesOff.description: Set subtitles to appear on SRS TTS messages.

_SetSRSOptions.description: Set SRS options for a given MSRS object.

SetSRSTower.description: Set SRS options for tower voice.

SetSRSPilot.description: Set SRS options for pilot voice.

SetLimitLanding.description: Set the number of aircraft groups, that are allowed to land simultaneously.

SetLandingInterval.description: Set time interval between landing clearance of groups.

SetMarkHoldingPattern.description: Set to mark the holding patterns on the F10 map.

SetParkingGuard.description: Set the parking guard group. This group is used to block (AI) aircraft from taxiing until they get clearance. It should contain of only one unit, *e.g.* a simple soldier.

SetParkingGuardStatic.description: Set the parking guard static. This static is used to block (AI) aircraft from taxiing until they get clearance.

SetRunwayRepairtime.description: Set the time until the runway(s) of an airdrome are repaired after it has been destroyed.

IsFlight.description: Is flight in queue of this flightcontrol.

IsCoordinateRunway.description: Check if coordinate is on runway.

onafterStart.description: Start FLIGHTCONTROL FSM. Handle events.

OnEventEngineStartup.description: Event handler for event engine startup.

OnEventEngineShutdown.description: Event handler for event engine shutdown.

_CheckFlightTakeoff.description: Check if a flight can get clearance for taxi/takeoff.

_CheckFlightLanding.description: Check if a flight can get clearance for taxi/takeoff.

_GetNextFlight.description: Get next flight in line, either waiting for landing or waiting for takeoff.

_GetNextFightHolding.description: Get next flight waiting for landing clearance.

_GetNextFightParking.description: Get next flight waiting for taxi and takeoff clearance.

IsControlling.description: Check if FC has control over this flight.

_InQueue.description: Check if a group is in a queue.

CountFlights.description: Count flights in a given status.

GetActiveRunway.description: Get the active runway based on current wind direction.

GetActiveRunwayLanding.description: Get the active runway for landing.

GetActiveRunwayTakeoff.description: Get the active runway for takeoff.

GetActiveRunwayText.description: Get the name of the active runway.

GetParkingSpotByID.description: Get parking spot by its Terminal ID.

_UpdateSpotStatus.description: Set parking spot to FREE and update F10 marker.

SetParkingFree.description: Set parking spot to FREE and update F10 marker.

SetParkingReserved.description: Set parking spot to RESERVED and update F10 marker.

SetParkingOccupied.description: Set parking spot to OCCUPIED and update F10 marker.

IsParkingFree.description: Check if parking spot is free.

IsParkingOccupied.description: Check if a parking spot is reserved by a flight group.

IsParkingReserved.description: Check if a parking spot is reserved by a flight group.

_GetPlayerSpot.description: Get parking spot this player was initially spawned on.

_GetFlightElement.description: Get element of flight from its unit name.

_CheckFlights.description: Check status of all registered flights and do some sanity checks.

_CheckParking.description: Check status of all registered flights and do some sanity checks.

_LandAI.description: Tell AI to land at the airbase. Flight is added to the landing queue.

_SpawnParkingGuard.description: [INTERNAL] Add parking guard in front of a parking aircraft - delayed for MP.

SpawnParkingGuard.description: Add parking guard in front of a parking aircraft.

_IsFlightOnRunway.description: Check if a flight is on a runway

SetCallSignOptions.description: [User] Set callsign options for TTS output. See @{Wrapper.Group#GROUP.GetCustomCallSign}() on how to set customized callsigns.

_GetCallsignName.description: Get callsign name of a given flight.

_GetPlayerUnitAndName.description: Returns the unit of a player and the player name. If the unit does not belong to a player, nil is returned.

_CheckMarkHoldingPatterns.description: Check holding pattern markers. Draw if they should exists and remove if they should not.

_MarkHoldingPattern.description: Draw marks of holding pattern (if they do not exist.

_UnMarkHoldingPattern.description: Removem markers of holding pattern (if they exist).

New.description: Create a new FLIGHTGROUP object and start the FSM.

AddTaskEnrouteEngageTargetsInZone.description: Add an *enroute* task to attack targets in a certain circular zone.

GetAirwing.description: Get airwing the flight group belongs to.

GetAirwingName.description: Get name of airwing the flight group belongs to.

GetSquadron.description: Get squadron the flight group belongs to.

GetSquadronName.description: Get squadron name the flight group belongs to.

SetVTOL.description: Set if aircraft is VTOL capable. Unfortunately, there is no DCS way to determine this via scripting.

SetProhibitAfterburner.description: Set if aircraft is not allowed to use afterburner.

SetAllowAfterburner.description: Set if aircraft is allowed to use afterburner.

SetJettisonEmptyTanks.description: Set if aircraft is allowed to drop empty fuel tanks - set to true to allow, and false to forbid it.

SetJettisonWeapons.description: Set if aircraft is allowed to drop weapons to escape danger - set to true to allow, and false to forbid it.

SetOptionLandingStraightIn.description: Set the aircraft to land straight in.

SetOptionLandingForcePair.description: Set the aircraft to land in pairs.

SetOptionLandingRestrictPair.description: Set the aircraft to NOT land in pairs.

SetOptionLandingOverheadBreak.description: Set the aircraft to land after overhead break.

SetOptionPreferVertical.description: [HELICOPTER] Set the aircraft to prefer takeoff and landing vertically.

SetReadyForTakeoff.description: Set if group is ready for taxi/takeoff if controlled by a `FLIGHTCONTROL`.

SetFlightControl.description: Set the FLIGHTCONTROL controlling this flight group.

GetFlightControl.description: Get the FLIGHTCONTROL controlling this flight group.

SetDestinationbase.description: Set the destination airbase. This is where the flight will go, when the final waypoint is reached.

SetAirboss.description: Set the AIRBOSS controlling this flight group.

SetFuelLowThreshold.description: Set low fuel threshold. Triggers event "FuelLow" and calls event function "OnAfterFuelLow".

SetFuelLowRTB.description: Set if low fuel threshold is reached, flight goes RTB.

SetOutOfAAMRTB.description: Set if flight is out of Air-Air-Missiles, flight goes RTB.

SetOutOfAGMRTB.description: Set if flight is out of Air-Ground-Missiles, flight goes RTB.

SetFuelLowRefuel.description: Set if low fuel threshold is reached, flight tries to refuel at the neares tanker.

SetFuelCriticalThreshold.description: Set fuel critical threshold. Triggers event "FuelCritical" and event function "OnAfterFuelCritical".

SetFuelCriticalRTB.description: Set if critical fuel threshold is reached, flight goes RTB.

SetDespawnAfterLanding.description: Enable that the group is despawned after landing. This can be useful to avoid DCS taxi issues with other AI or players or jamming taxiways.

SetDespawnAfterHolding.description: Enable that the group is despawned after holding. This can be useful to avoid DCS taxi issues with other AI or players or jamming taxiways.

IsTaxiing.description: Check if is taxiing to the runway.

IsAirborne.description: Check if flight is airborne or cruising.

IsCruising.description: Check if flight is airborne or cruising.

IsLanded.description: Check if flight has landed and is now taxiing to its parking spot.

IsArrived.description: Check if flight has arrived at its destination parking spot.

IsInbound.description: Check if flight is inbound and traveling to holding pattern.

IsHolding.description: Check if flight is holding and waiting for landing clearance.

IsGoing4Fuel.description: Check if flight is going for fuel.

IsLandingAt.description: Check if helo(!) flight is ordered to land at a specific point.

IsLandedAt.description: Check if helo(!) flight has landed at a specific point.

IsFuelLow.description: Check if flight is low on fuel.

IsFuelCritical.description: Check if flight is critical on fuel.

IsFuelGood.description: Check if flight is good on fuel (not below low or even critical state).

CanAirToGround.description: Check if flight can do air-to-ground tasks.

CanAirToAir.description: Check if flight can do air-to-air attacks.

ClearToLand.description: Clear the group for landing when it is holding.

GetFuelMin.description: Get min fuel of group. This returns the relative fuel amount of the element lowest fuel in the group.

GetKills.description: Get number of kills of this group.

OnEventEngineStartup.description: Flightgroup event function handling the crash of a unit.

OnEventTakeOff.description: Flightgroup event function handling the crash of a unit.

OnEventLanding.description: Flightgroup event function handling the crash of a unit.

OnEventEngineShutdown.description: Flightgroup event function handling the crash of a unit.

OnEventCrash.description: Flightgroup event function handling the crash of a unit.

OnEventUnitLost.description: Flightgroup event function handling the crash of a unit.

onafterParking.description: On after "Parking" event. Add flight to flightcontrol of airbase.

onbeforeUpdateRoute.description: On before "UpdateRoute" event. Update route of group, e.g after new waypoints and/or waypoint tasks have been added.

_CheckGroupDone.description: Check if flight is done, i.e.

onafterRTB.description: On after "RTB" event. Order flight to hold at an airbase and wait for signal to land.

onafterHolding.description: On after "Holding" event. Flight arrived at the holding point.

onbeforeLandAt.description: On before "LandAt" event. Check we have a helo group.

onafterLandAt.description: On after "LandAt" event. Order helicopter to land at a specific point.

_ReachedHolding.description: Function called when flight has reached the holding point.

_ClearedToLand.description: Function called when flight has reached the holding point.

_OnFinal.description: Function called when flight is on final.

_FinishedRefuelling.description: Function called when flight finished refuelling.

_FinishedWaiting.description: Function called when flight finished waiting.

_InitGroup.description: Initialize group parameters. Also initializes waypoints if self.waypoints is nil.

GetHomebaseFromWaypoints.description: Check if a unit is and element of the flightgroup.

FindNearestAirbase.description: Find the nearest friendly airbase (same or neutral coalition).

GetDestinationFromWaypoints.description: Check if a unit is and element of the flightgroup.

IsTakeoffHot.description: Check if this is a hot start.

IsTakeoffCold.description: Check if this is a cold start.

IsTakeoffRunway.description: Check if this is a runway start.

IsTakeoffAir.description: Check if this is an air start.

IsLandingAir.description: Check if the final waypoint is in the air.

IsLandingAirbase.description: Check if the final waypoint is at an airbase.

AddWaypoint.description: Add an AIR waypoint to the flight plan.

AddWaypointLanding.description: Add an LANDING waypoint to the flight plan.

_SetElementParkingFree.description: Set parking spot of element to free

_IsHumanUnit.description: Checks if a human player sits in the unit.

_IsHuman.description: Checks if a group has a human player.

_GetPlayerUnitAndName.description: Returns the unit of a player and the player name. If the unit does not belong to a player, nil is returned.

GetParkingSpot.description: Returns the parking spot of the element.

GetClosestAirbase.description: Search unoccupied parking spots at the airbase for all flight elements.

GetParking.description: Search unoccupied parking spots at the airbase for all flight elements.

_GetObjectSize.description: Size of the bounding box of a DCS object derived from the DCS descriptor table. If boundinb box is nil, a size of zero is returned.

_GetAttribute.description: Get the generalized attribute of a group.

_GetTerminal.description: Get the proper terminal type based on generalized attribute of the group.

_CheckStuck.description: Check if group got stuck. This overwrites the OPSGROUP function.

_GetDistToParking.description: Get distance to parking spot. Takes extra care of ships.

FLOTILLA.description:
is a small naval group belonging to a fleet.

--

New.description: Create a new FLOTILLA object and start the FSM.

onafterStart.description: On after Start event. Starts the FLIGHTGROUP FSM and event handlers.

New.description: Create a new INTEL object and start the FSM.

SetAcceptZones.description: Set accept zones. Only contacts detected in this/these zone(s) are considered.

AddAcceptZone.description: Add an accept zone. Only contacts detected in this zone are considered.

RemoveAcceptZone.description: Remove an accept zone from the accept zone set.

SetRejectZones.description: Set reject zones. Contacts detected in this/these zone(s) are rejected and not reported by the detection.

RemoveCorridorZone.description: Remove a corrdidor zone from the corrdidor zone set.

SetCorridorLimitsFeet.description: [Air] Add corrdidor zone floor and height. This is generally applicable to all(!) corridor zones. Considered as ASL (above sea level or barometric) values.

SetForgetTime.description: OBSOLETE, not functional!  Set forget contacts time interval.

SetFilterCategory.description: Filter unit categories. Valid categories are:
