SetAcceptRange.description: Set the accept range in kilometers from each of the recce. Only object closer than this range will be detected.

FilterCategoryGroup.description: Filter group categories. Valid categories are:

AddAgent.description: Add a group to the detection set.

SetClusterAnalysis.description: Enable or disable cluster analysis of detected targets.

SetDetectStatics.description: Set whether STATIC objects are detected.

AddMissionToContact.description: Add a Mission (Auftrag) to a contact for tracking.

AddMissionToCluster.description: Add a Mission (Auftrag) to a cluster for tracking.

SetDetectionTypes.description: Set detection types for this #INTEL - all default to true.

GetContactTypeName.description: Get type name of a contact.

GetContactCategoryName.description: Get category name of a contact.

onafterStart.description: On after Start event. Starts the FLIGHTGROUP FSM and event handlers.

_CreateContact.description: Create an #INTEL.Contact item from a given GROUP or STATIC object.

GetDetectedUnitsAccoustic.description: (Internal) Return the detected target groups of the controllable as a @{Core.Set#SET_GROUP}.

KnowObject.description: Make the INTEL aware of a object that was not detected (yet). This will add the object to the contacts table and trigger a `NewContact` event.

_IsContactKnown.description: Check if a Contact is already known. It is checked, whether the contact is in the contacts table.

AddContact.description: Add a contact to our list.

RemoveContact.description: Remove a contact from our list.

_CheckContactLost.description: Check if a contact was lost.

PaintPicture.description: [Internal] Paint picture of the battle field. Does Cluster analysis and updates clusters. Sets markers if markers are enabled.

_CreateClusterFromContact.description: Create a new cluster from a first contact. The contact is automatically added to the cluster.

AddContactToCluster.description: Add a contact to the cluster.

RemoveContactFromCluster.description: Remove a contact from a cluster.

CalcClusterFuturePosition.description: Calculate cluster future position after given seconds.

CheckContactInClusters.description: Check if contact is in any known cluster.

IsContactConnectedToCluster.description: Check if contact is close to any other contact this cluster.

IsContactPartOfAnyClusters.description: Check if contact is close to any contact of known clusters.

GetClusterOfContact.description: Get the cluster this contact belongs to (if any).

GetClusterAltitude.description: Get the altitude of a cluster.

GetClusterCoordinate.description: Get the coordinate of a cluster.

_CheckClusterCoordinateChanged.description: Check if the coordindate of the cluster changed.

_UpdateClusterPositions.description: Update coordinates of the known clusters.

ContactCountUnits.description: Count number of alive units in contact.

ClusterCountUnits.description: Count number of alive units in cluster.

GetHighestThreatContact.description: Get the contact with the highest threat level from the cluster.

AddIntel.description: Function to add an #INTEL object to the aggregator

onafterStart.description: Function to start the work.

SetDLinkCacheTime.description: Function to set how long INTEL DLINK remembers contacts.

onbeforeCollect.description: Function to collect data from the various #INTEL

onbeforeCollected.description: Function called after collection is done

GetContactTable.description: Function to query the detected contacts

GetClusterTable.description: Function to query the detected clusters

GetDetectedItemCoordinates.description: Function to query the detected contact coordinates

LEGION.description:
Warehouse.
--
-- Parent class of Airwings, Brigades and Fleets.
--
-- ===
--
-- ### Author:

New.description: Create a new LEGION class object.

AddMission.description: Add a mission for the legion. It will pick the best available assets for the mission and lauch it when ready.

AddCohort.description: Add cohort to cohort table of this legion.

DelCohort.description: Remove cohort from cohor table of this legion.

RelocateCohort.description: Relocate a cohort to another legion.

IsCohort.description: Check if cohort is part of this legion.

GetName.description: Get name of legion. This is the alias of the warehouse.

IsBrigade.description: Check if a BRIGADE class is calling.

IsAirwing.description: Check if the AIRWING class is calling.

IsFleet.description: Check if the FLEET class is calling.

onafterStart.description: Start LEGION FSM.

CheckMissionQueue.description: Check mission queue and assign ONE mission.

CheckTransportQueue.description: Check transport queue and assign ONE transport.

onafterMissionAssign.description: On after "MissionAssign" event. Mission is added to a LEGION mission queue and already requested. Needs assets to be added to the mission already.

_AddRequest.description: Create a request and add it to the warehouse queue.

onafterMissionRequest.description: On after "MissionRequest" event. Performs a self request to the warehouse for the mission assets. Sets mission status to REQUESTED.

onafterTransportAssign.description: On after "TransportAssign" event. Transport is added to a LEGION transport queue and assets are requested from the LEGION warehouse.

onafterTransportRequest.description: On after "TransportRequest" event. Performs a self request to the warehouse for the transport assets. Sets transport status to REQUESTED.

onafterMissionCancel.description: On after "MissionCancel" event. Cancels the missions of all flightgroups. Deletes request from warehouse queue.

onafterNewAsset.description: On after "NewAsset" event. Asset is added to the given cohort (asset assignment).

onafterLegionAssetReturned.description: On after "LegionAssetReturned" event. Triggered when an asset group returned to its legion.

onafterAssetSpawned.description: On after "AssetSpawned" event triggered when an asset group is spawned into the cruel world.

onafterAssetDead.description: On after "AssetDead" event triggered when an asset group died.

onafterDestroyed.description: On after "Destroyed" event. Remove assets from cohorts. Stop cohorts.

_CreateFlightGroup.description: Create a new OPS group after an asset was spawned.

IsAssetOnMission.description: Check if an asset is currently on a mission (STARTED or EXECUTING).

GetAssetCurrentMission.description: Get the current mission of the asset.

CountAssets.description: Count total number of assets of the legion.

GetOpsGroups.description: Get OPSGROUPs that are spawned and alive.

CountAssetsWithPayloadsInStock.description: Count total number of assets in LEGION warehouse stock that also have a payload.

GetAircraftTypes.description: Get the unit types of this legion. These are the unit types of all assigned cohorts.

_CountPayloads.description: Count payloads of all cohorts for all unit types.

RecruitAssetsForMission.description: Recruit assets for a given mission.

RecruitAssetsForTransport.description: Recruit assets for a given OPS transport.

RecruitAssetsForEscort.description: Recruit assets performing an escort mission for a given asset.

_CohortCan.description: Recruit assets from Cohorts for the given parameters. NOTE that we set the `asset.isReserved=true` flag so it cant be recruited by anyone else.

UnRecruitAssets.description: Unrecruit assets. Set `isReserved` to false, return payload to airwing and (optionally) remove from assigned mission.

AssignAssetsForEscort.description: Recruit and assign assets performing an escort mission for a given asset list. Note that each asset gets an escort.

AssignAssetsForTransport.description: Recruit and assign assets performing an OPSTRANSPORT for a given asset list.

CalculateAssetMissionScore.description: Calculate the mission score of an asset.

_OptimizeAssetSelection.description: Optimize chosen assets for the mission at hand.

GetMissionByID.description: Returns the mission for a given mission ID (Autragsnummer).

GetTransportByID.description: Returns the mission for a given ID.

GetMissionFromRequestID.description: Returns the mission for a given request ID.

GetMissionFromRequest.description: Returns the mission for a given request.

FetchPayloadFromStock.description: Fetch a payload from the airwing resources for a given unit and mission type.

ReturnPayloadFromAsset.description: Return payload from asset back to stock.

New.description: Create a new NAVYGROUP class object.

SetPatrolAdInfinitum.description: Group patrols ad inifintum. If the last waypoint is reached, it will go to waypoint one and repeat its route.

SetIntoWindLegacy.description: Set if old into wind calculation is used when carrier turns into the wind for a recovery.

_CreateTurnIntoWind.description: Create a turn into wind window. Note that this is not executed as it not added to the queue.

AddTurnIntoWind.description: Add a time window, where the groups steams into the wind.

GetTurnIntoWind.description: Get "Turn Into Wind" data. You can specify a certain ID.

ExtendTurnIntoWind.description: Extend duration of turn into wind.

RemoveTurnIntoWind.description: Remove steam into wind window from queue. If the window is currently active, it is stopped first.

IsHolding.description: Check if the group is currently holding its positon.

IsCruising.description: Check if the group is currently cruising.

IsOnDetour.description: Check if the group is currently on a detour.

IsDiving.description: Check if the group is currently diving.

IsTurning.description: Check if the group is currently turning.

IsSteamingIntoWind.description: Check if the group is currently steaming into the wind.

IsRecovering.description: Check if the group is currently recovering aircraft.

IsLaunching.description: Check if the group is currently launching aircraft.

AddWaypoint.description: Add an a waypoint to the route.

_InitGroup.description: Initialize group parameters. Also initializes waypoints if self.waypoints is nil.

_CheckFreePath.description: Check for possible collisions between two coordinates.

GetTurnIntoWindNext.description: Get the next turn into wind window, which is not yet running.

GetTurnIntoWindCurrent.description: Get the turn into wind window, which is currently open.

GetWind.description: Get wind direction and speed at current position.

GetHeadingIntoWind_old.description: Get heading of group into the wind.

GetHeadingIntoWind_new.description: Get heading of group into the wind. This minimizes the cross wind for an angled runway.

GetHeadingIntoWind.description: Get heading of group into the wind. This minimizes the cross wind for an angled runway.

_FindPathToNextWaypoint.description: Find free path to next waypoint.

New.description: Create a new generic OPERATION object.

SetTime.description: Set start and stop time of the operation.

AddConditonOverAll.description: Add (all) condition function when the whole operation is over. Must return a `#boolean`.

AddConditonOverAny.description: Add (any) condition function when the whole operation is over. Must return a `#boolean`.

AddPhase.description: Add a new phase to the operation. This is added add the end of all previously added phases (if any).

InsertPhaseAfter.description: Insert a new phase after an already defined phase of the operation.

GetName.description: Get a name of this operation.

GetPhaseByName.description: Get a phase by its name.

SetPhaseConditonOver.description: Set condition when the given phase is over.

AddPhaseConditonOverAll.description: Add condition function when the given phase is over. Must return a `#boolean`.

AddPhaseConditonOverAny.description: Add condition function when the given phase is over. Must return a `#boolean`.

SetConditionFunctionPersistence.description: Set persistence of condition function. By default, condition functions are removed after a phase is over.

AddPhaseConditonRepeatAll.description: Add condition function when the given phase is to be repeated. The provided function must return a `#boolean`.

GetPhaseConditonOver.description: Get condition when the given phase is over.

GetPhaseNactive.description: Get how many times a phase has been active.

AddBranch.description: Add a new branch to the operation.

GetBranchMaster.description: Get the master branch. This is the default branch and should always exist (if it was not explicitly deleted).

AddEdge.description: Add an edge between two branches.

AddEdgeConditonSwitchAll.description: Add condition function to an edge when branches are switched. The function must return a `#boolean`.

AssignLegion.description: Assign legion to operation. All cohorts of this legion will be assigned and are only available.

IsAssignedLegion.description: Check if a given legion is assigned to this operation. All cohorts of this legion will be checked.

IsAssignedCohort.description: Check if a given cohort is assigned to this operation.

IsAssignedCohortOrLegion.description: Check if a given cohort or legion is assigned to this operation.

IsPlanned.description: Check if operation is in FSM state "Planned".

IsRunning.description: Check if operation is in FSM state "Running".

IsPaused.description: Check if operation is in FSM state "Paused".

IsOver.description: Check if operation is in FSM state "Over".

IsStopped.description: Check if operation is in FSM state "Stopped".

IsNotOver.description: Check if operation is not "Over" or "Stopped".

IsPhaseActive.description: Check if a phase is the currently active one.

IsPhasePlanned.description: Check if phase is in status "Planned".

IsPhaseOver.description: Check if phase is in status "Over".

onafterStart.description: On after "Start" event.

New.description: Create a new OPSGROUP class object.

GetLifePoints.description: Returns the absolute total life points of the group.

_SetLegion.description: Set legion this ops group belongs to.

SetReturnToLegion.description: [GROUND, NAVAL] Set whether this group should return to its legion once all mission etc are finished. Only for ground and naval groups. Aircraft will

KnowTarget.description: Make a target (unit, group, opsgroup) known to this group.

InWeaponRange.description: Check if a given coordinate is in weapon range.

GetCoordinateInRange.description: Get a coordinate, which is in weapon range.

GetLaserCoordinate.description: Get current LASER coordinate, i.e. where the beam is pointing at if the LASER is on.

GetLaserTarget.description: Get current target of the LASER. This can be a STATIC or UNIT object.

SetCheckZones.description: Define a SET of zones that trigger and event if the group enters or leaves any of the zones.

AddCheckZone.description: Add a zone that triggers and event if the group enters or leaves any of the zones.

AddWeaponRange.description: Add a weapon range for ARTY auftrag.

GetThreat.description: Get highest detected threat. Detection must be turned on. The threat level is a number between 0 and 10, where 0 is the lowest, e.g. unarmed units.

SetEngageDetectedOn.description: Enable to automatically engage detected targets.

SetEngageDetectedOff.description: Disable to automatically engage detected targets.

SetRearmOnOutOfAmmo.description: Set that group is going to rearm once it runs out of ammo.

SetRetreatOnOutOfAmmo.description: Set that group is retreating once it runs out of ammo.

SetReturnOnOutOfAmmo.description: Set that group is return to legion once it runs out of ammo.

SetCargoBayLimit.description: Set max weight that each unit of the group can handle.

HasLoS.description: Check if an element of the group has line of sight to a coordinate.

GetVec2.description: Get current 2D position vector of the group.

GetVec3.description: Get current 3D position vector of the group.

GetCoordinate.description: Get current coordinate of the group. If the current position cannot be determined, the last known position is returned.

GetVelocity.description: Get current velocity of the group.

GetHeading.description: Get current heading of the group or (optionally) of a specific unit of the group.

GetOrientation.description: Get current orientation of the group.

GetOrientationX.description: Get current "X" orientation of the first unit in the group.

CheckTaskDescriptionUnique.description: Check if task description is unique.

DespawnUnit.description: Despawn a unit of the group. A "Remove Unit" event is generated by default.

DespawnElement.description: Despawn an element/unit of the group.

Despawn.description: Despawn the group. The whole group is despawned and a "`Remove Unit`" event is generated for all current units of the group.

ReturnToLegion.description: Return group back to the legion it belongs to.

DestroyUnit.description: Destroy a unit of the group. A *Unit Lost* for aircraft or *Dead* event for ground/naval units is generated.

Destroy.description: Destroy group. The whole group is despawned and a *Unit Lost* for aircraft or *Dead* event for ground/naval units is generated for all current units.

Deactivate.description: Deactivate the group. Group will be respawned in late activated state.

SelfDestruction.description: Self destruction of group. An explosion is created at the position of each element.

RadioTransmission.description: Send a radio transmission via SRS Text-To-Speech.

SetCarrierLoaderAllAspect.description: Set that this carrier is an all aspect loader.

SetCarrierLoaderFront.description: Set that this carrier is a front loader.

SetCarrierLoaderBack.description: Set that this carrier is a back loader.

SetCarrierLoaderStarboard.description: Set that this carrier is a starboard (right side) loader.

SetCarrierLoaderPort.description: Set that this carrier is a port (left side) loader.

SetCarrierUnloaderAllAspect.description: Set that this carrier is an all aspect unloader.

SetCarrierUnloaderFront.description: Set that this carrier is a front unloader.

SetCarrierUnloaderBack.description: Set that this carrier is a back unloader.

SetCarrierUnloaderStarboard.description: Set that this carrier is a starboard (right side) unloader.

SetCarrierUnloaderPort.description: Set that this carrier is a port (left side) unloader.

IsInZone.description: Check if group is currently inside a zone.

IsFlightgroup.description: Check if this is a FLIGHTGROUP.

IsArmygroup.description: Check if this is a ARMYGROUP.

IsNavygroup.description: Check if this is a NAVYGROUP.

IsLateActivated.description: Check if this group is currently "late activated" and needs to be "activated" to appear in the mission.

IsInUtero.description: Check if group is in state in utero. Note that dead groups are also in utero but will return `false` here.

IsSpawned.description: Check if group is in state spawned.

IsDead.description: Check if group is dead. Could be destroyed or despawned. FSM state of dead group is `InUtero` though.

IsUncontrolled.description: Check if this group is currently "uncontrolled" and needs to be "started" to begin its route.

HasPassedFinalWaypoint.description: Check if this group has passed its final waypoint.

IsRearming.description: Check if the group is currently rearming or on its way to the rearming place.

IsOutOfAmmo.description: Check if the group is completely out of ammo.

IsOutOfBombs.description: Check if the group is out of bombs.

IsOutOfGuns.description: Check if the group is out of guns.

IsOutOfMissiles.description: Check if the group is out of missiles.

IsOutOfTorpedos.description: Check if the group is out of torpedos.

IsLasing.description: Check if the group has currently switched a LASER on.

IsRetreating.description: Check if the group is currently retreating or retreated.

IsRetreated.description: Check if the group is retreated (has reached its retreat zone).

IsReturning.description: Check if the group is currently returning to a zone.

IsEngaging.description: Check if the group is engaging another unit or group.

IsWaiting.description: Check if group is currently waiting.

IsNotCarrier.description: Check if the group is not a carrier yet.

IsCarrier.description: Check if the group is a carrier.

IsPickingup.description: Check if the group is picking up cargo.

IsLoading.description: Check if the group is loading cargo.

IsTransporting.description: Check if the group is transporting cargo.

IsUnloading.description: Check if the group is unloading cargo.

IsCargo.description: Check if the group is assigned as cargo.

IsNotCargo.description: Check if the group is not cargo.

IsAwaitingLift.description: Check if awaiting a transport lift.

_RemovePausedMission.description: Remove paused mission from the table.

IsBoarding.description: Check if the group is currently boarding a carrier.

IsLoaded.description: Check if the group is currently loaded into a carrier.

IsBusy.description: Check if the group is currently busy doing something.

RemoveWaypointMarkers.description: Remove waypoints markers on the F10 map.

GetWaypointByID.description: Get the waypoint from its unique ID.

GetWaypointByIndex.description: Get the waypoint from its index.

GetWaypointUIDFromIndex.description: Get the waypoint UID from its index, i.e. its current position in the waypoints table.

GetWaypointIndex.description: Get the waypoint index (its position in the current waypoints table).

GetWaypointIndexCurrent.description: Get current waypoint index. This is the index of the last passed waypoint.

GetWaypointIndexAfterID.description: Get waypoint index after waypoint with given ID. So if the waypoint has index 3 it will return 4.

GetNextWaypointCoordinate.description: Get coordinate of next waypoint of the group.

GetWaypointID.description: Get unique ID of waypoint given its index.

GetSpeedToWaypoint.description: Returns a non-zero speed to the next waypoint (even if the waypoint speed is zero).

GetTimeToWaypoint.description: Get time to waypoint based on current velocity.

RemoveWaypointByID.description: Remove a waypoint with a ceratin UID.

OnEventBirth.description: Event function handling the birth of a unit.

OnEventHit.description: Event function handling the hit of a unit.

OnEventDead.description: Event function handling the dead of a unit.

OnEventRemoveUnit.description: Event function handling when a unit is removed from the game.

OnEventPlayerLeaveUnit.description: Event function handling when a unit is removed from the game.

OnEventKill.description: Event function handling the event that a unit achieved a kill.

SetTask.description: Set DCS task. Enroute tasks are injected automatically.

HasTaskController.description: Returns true if the DCS controller currently has a task.

CountRemainingTasks.description: Count the number of tasks that still pending in the queue.

_GetNextTask.description: Get next task in queue. Task needs to be in state SCHEDULED and time must have passed.

GetTaskCurrent.description: Get the currently executed task if there is any.

_SandwitchDCSTask.description: Sandwitch DCS task in stop condition and push the task to the group.

onafterTaskCancel.description: On after "TaskCancel" event. Cancels the current task or simply sets the status to DONE if the task is not the current one.

onbeforeTaskDone.description: On before "TaskDone" event. Deny transition if task status is PAUSED.

CancelAllMissions.description: Cancel all missions in mission queue that are not already done or cancelled.

IsMissionInQueue.description: Check if a given mission is already in the queue.

IsMissionTypeInQueue.description: Check if a given mission type is already in the queue.

GetMissionByTaskID.description: Get mission by its task id.

IsOnMission.description: Check if group is currently on a mission.

onafterMissionExecute.description: On after "MissionExecute" event. Mission execution began.

onafterMissionCancel.description: On after "MissionCancel" event. Cancels the mission.

_SetMissionOptions.description: Set mission specific options for ROE, Alarm state, etc.

onafterGotoWaypoint.description: On after "GotoWaypoint" event. Group will got to the given waypoint and execute its route from there.

onafterDetectedUnitNew.description: On after "DetectedUnitNew" event. Add newly detected unit to detected unit set.

onafterDetectedGroupNew.description: On after "DetectedGroupNew" event. Add newly detected group to detected group set.

onbeforeLaserOff.description: On before "LaserOff" event. Check if LASER is on.

onafterLaserCode.description: On after "LaserCode" event. Changes the LASER code.

onbeforeElementSpawned.description: On before "ElementSpawned" event. Check that element is not in status spawned already.

Teleport.description: Teleport the group to a different location.

_Spawn.description: Spawn group from a given template.

_IsInCargobay.description: Check if a group is in the cargo bay.

_AddCargobay.description: Add OPSGROUP to cargo bay of a carrier.

_AddCargobayStorage.description: Add warehouse storage to cargo bay of a carrier.

_CreateMyCargo.description: Add OPSGROUP to cargo bay of a carrier.

_AddMyCargoBay.description: Add storage to cargo bay of a carrier.

_GetMyCargoBayFromUID.description: Get cargo bay data from a cargo data id.

GetCargoGroups.description: Get all groups currently loaded as cargo.

_GetCargobayElement.description: Remove OPSGROUP from cargo bay of a carrier.

_DelCargobayElement.description: Remove OPSGROUP from cargo bay of a carrier.

_DelCargobay.description: Remove OPSGROUP from cargo bay of a carrier.

_GetNextCargoTransport.description: Get cargo transport from cargo queue.

_CheckDelivered.description: Check if all cargo of this transport assignment was delivered.

_CheckGoPickup.description: Check if all cargo of this transport assignment was delivered.

DelOpsTransport.description: Delete a cargo transport assignment from the cargo queue.

GetOpsTransportByUID.description: Get cargo transport assignment from the cargo queue by its unique ID.

GetWeightTotal.description: Get total weight of the group including cargo. Optionally, the total weight of a specific unit can be requested.

GetFreeCargobayRelative.description: Get relative free cargo bay in percent.

GetUsedCargobayRelative.description: Get relative used (loaded) cargo bay in percent.

GetFreeCargobayMax.description: Get max weight of cargo (group) this group can load. This is the largest free cargo bay of any (not dead) element of the group.

GetWeightCargo.description: Get weight of the internal cargo the group is carriing right now.

GetWeightCargoMax.description: Get max weight of the internal cargo the group can carry. Optionally, the max cargo weight of a specific unit can be requested.

GetCargoOpsGroups.description: Get OPSGROUPs in the cargo bay.

AddWeightCargo.description: Add weight to the internal cargo of an element of the group.

RedWeightCargo.description: Reduce weight to the internal cargo of an element of the group.

_GetWeightStorage.description: Get weight of warehouse storage to transport.

CanCargo.description: Check if the group can *in principle* be carrier of a cargo group. This checks the max cargo capacity of the group but *not* how much cargo is already loaded (if any).

FindCarrierForCargo.description: Find carrier for cargo by evaluating the free cargo bay storage.

_TransferCargo.description: Transfer cargo from to another carrier.

onafterLoad.description: On after "Load" event. Carrier loads a cargo group into ints cargo bay.

onafterLoadingDone.description: On after "LoadingDone" event. Carrier has loaded all (possible) cargo at the pickup zone.

onafterUnload.description: On after "Unload" event. Carrier unloads a cargo group from its cargo bay.

_CheckInZones.description: Check if group is in zones.

_CheckGroupDone.description: Check if passed the final waypoint and, if necessary, update route.

_PrintTaskAndMissionStatus.description: Print info on mission and task status to DCS log file.

_SimpleTaskFunction.description: Simple task function. Can be used to call a function which has the warehouse and the executing group as parameters.

_PassingWaypoint.description: Function called when a group is passing a waypoint.

_TaskExecute.description: Function called when a task is executed.

_TaskDone.description: Function called when a task is done.

SetDefaultROE.description: Set the default ROE for the group. This is the ROE state gets when the group is spawned or to which it defaults back after a mission.

SwitchROE.description: Set current ROE for the group.

_GetROEName.description: Get name of ROE corresponding to the numerical value.

GetROE.description: Get current ROE of the group.

SetDefaultROT.description: Set the default ROT for the group. This is the ROT state gets when the group is spawned or to which it defaults back after a mission.

GetROT.description: Get current ROT of the group.

SetDefaultAlarmstate.description: Set the default Alarm State for the group. This is the state gets when the group is spawned or to which it defaults back after a mission.

SwitchAlarmstate.description: Set current Alarm State of the group.

GetAlarmstate.description: Get current Alarm State of the group.

SetDefaultEPLRS.description: Set the default EPLRS for the group.

SwitchEPLRS.description: Switch EPLRS datalink on or off.

SetDefaultEmission.description: Set the default emission state for the group.

SetDefaultInvisible.description: Set the default invisible for the group.

SetDefaultImmortal.description: Set the default immortal for the group.

SetDefaultRadio.description: Set default Radio frequency and modulation.

GetRadio.description: Get current Radio frequency and modulation.

SwitchRadio.description: Turn radio on or switch frequency/modulation.

GetCallsignName.description: Get callsign of the first element alive.

_UpdatePosition.description: Check if all elements of the group have the same status (or are dead).

_AllSameStatus.description: Check if all elements of the group have the same status (or are dead).

_AllSimilarStatus.description: Check if all elements of the group have the same status (or are dead).

_UpdateStatus.description: Check if all elements of the group have the same status or are dead.

_SetElementStatusAll.description: Set status for all elements (except dead ones).

GetElementByName.description: Get the element of a group.

GetElementZoneBoundingBox.description: Get the bounding box of the element.

GetElementZoneLoad.description: Get the loading zone of the element.

GetElementZoneUnload.description: Get the unloading zone of the element.

_GetElementZoneLoader.description: Get/update the (un-)loading zone of the element.

GetElementAlive.description: Get the first element of a group, which is alive.

GetAmmoElement.description: Get the number of shells a unit or group currently has. For a group the ammo count of all units is summed up.

GetAmmoTot.description: Get total amount of ammunition of the whole group.

GetAmmoUnit.description: Get the number of shells a unit or group currently has. For a group the ammo count of all units is summed up.

_MissileCategoryName.description: Returns a name of a missile category.

_IsElement.description: Check if a unit is an element of the flightgroup.

_AddElementByName.description: Add a unit/element to the OPS group.

_SetTemplate.description: Set the template of the group.

_GetTemplate.description: Get the template of the group.

New.description: Create a new OPSTRANSPORT class object. Essential input are the troops that should be transported and the zones where the troops are picked up and deployed.

AddTransportZoneCombo.description: Add pickup and deploy zone combination.

AddCargoGroups.description: Add cargo groups to be transported.

SetDisembarkActivation.description: Set activation status of group when disembarked from transport carrier.

SetDisembarkCarriers.description: Set/add transfer carrier(s). These are carrier groups, where the cargo is directly loaded into when disembarked.

_AddDisembarkCarriers.description: Set/add transfer carrier(s). These are carrier groups, where the cargo is directly loaded into when disembarked.

GetDisembarkCarriers.description: Get transfer carrier(s). These are carrier groups, where the cargo is directly loaded into when disembarked.

SetDisembarkInUtero.description: Set if group remains *in utero* after disembarkment from carrier. Can be used to directly load the group into another carrier. Similar to disembark in late activated state.

SetRequiredCargos.description: Set required cargo. This is a list of cargo groups that need to be loaded before the first transport will start.

GetRequiredCargos.description: Get required cargos. This is a list of cargo groups that need to be loaded before the first transport will start.

SetRequiredCarriers.description: Set number of required carrier groups for an OPSTRANSPORT assignment. Only used if transport is assigned at LEGION or higher level.

GetRequiredCarriers.description: Get the number of required carrier groups for an OPSTRANSPORT assignment. Only used if transport is assigned at LEGION or higher level.

_AddCarrier.description: Add a carrier assigned for this transport.

_DelCarrier.description: Remove group from the current carrier list/table.

_GetCarrierNames.description: Get a list of alive carriers.

GetCargoOpsGroups.description: Get (all) cargo @{Ops.OpsGroup#OPSGROUP}s. Optionally, only delivered or undelivered groups can be returned.

GetCargoStorages.description: Get (all) cargo @{Ops.OpsGroup#OPSGROUP}s. Optionally, only delivered or undelivered groups can be returned.

SetTime.description: Set transport start and stop time.

SetPriority.description: Set mission priority and (optional) urgency. Urgent missions can cancel other running missions.

AddPathTransport.description: Add path used for transportation from the pickup to the deploy zone.

SetCarrierTransportStatus.description: Add a carrier assigned for this transport.

GetUID.description: Get unique ID of the transport assignment.

GetNcargoDelivered.description: Get number of delivered cargo groups.

GetNcarrier.description: Get number of carrier groups assigned for this transport.

GetTZCofCargo.description: Get transport zone combo of cargo group.

IsCarrier.description: Check if an OPS group is assigned as carrier for this transport.

IsReadyToGo.description: Check if transport is ready to be started.

IsDelivered.description: Check if all cargo was delivered (or is dead).

IsCargoDelivered.description: Check if a cargo group was delivered.

_CheckDelivered.description: Check if all cargo of this transport assignment was delivered.

_CheckRequiredCargos.description: Check if all required cargos are loaded.

EvalConditionsAll.description: Check if all given condition are true.

FindTransferCarrierForCargo.description: Find transfer carrier element for cargo group.

_CreateCargoGroupData.description: Create a cargo group data structure.

_CreateCargoStorage.description: Create a cargo group data structure.

_CountCargosInZone.description: Count how many cargo groups are inside a zone.

_GetTransportZoneCombo.description: Get a transport zone combination (TZC) for a carrier group. The pickup zone will be a zone, where the most cargo groups are located that fit into the carrier.

_GetOpsGroupFromObject.description: Get an OPSGROUP from a given OPSGROUP or GROUP object. If the object is a GROUP, an OPSGROUP is created automatically.

New.description: Create a new OPSZONE class object.

SetObjectCategories.description: Set categories of objects that can capture or hold the zone.

SetUnitCategories.description: Set categories of units that can capture or hold the zone. See [DCS Class Unit](https://wiki.hoggitworld.com/view/DCS_Class_Unit).

SetCaptureThreatlevel.description: Set threat level threshold that the offending units must have to capture a zone.

SetCaptureNunits.description: Set how many units must be present in a zone to capture it. By default, one unit is enough.

SetCaptureTime.description: Set time how long an attacking coalition must have troops inside a zone before it captures the zone.

SetNeutralCanCapture.description: Set whether *neutral* units can capture the zone.

SetDrawZone.description: Set if zone is drawn on the F10 map. Color will change depending on current owning coalition.

SetDrawZoneForCoalition.description: Set if zone is drawn on the F10 map for the owner coalition only.

SetMarkZone.description: Set if a marker on the F10 map shows the current zone status.

GetOwner.description: Get current owner of the zone.

GetOwnerName.description: Get coalition name of current owner of the zone.

GetScannedUnitSet.description: Get scanned units inside the zone.

GetScannedGroupSet.description: Get scanned groups inside the zone.

GetRandomCoordinate.description: Returns a random coordinate in the zone.

GetPreviousOwner.description: Get previous owner of the zone.

GetAttackDuration.description: Get duration of the current attack.

FindByName.description: Find an OPSZONE using the Zone Name.

IsRed.description: Check if the red coalition is currently owning the zone.

IsBlue.description: Check if the blue coalition is currently owning the zone.

IsNeutral.description: Check if the neutral coalition is currently owning the zone.

IsCoalition.description: Check if a certain coalition is currently owning the zone.

IsStarted.description: Check if zone is started (not stopped).

IsAttacked.description: Check if zone is being attacked by the opposite coalition.

IsContested.description: Check if zone is contested. Contested here means red *and* blue units are present in the zone.

onafterStart.description: Start OPSZONE FSM.

_GetZoneColor.description: Get RGB color of zone depending on current owner.

SetZoneColor.description: Set custom RGB color of zone depending on current owner.

_UpdateMarker.description: Update marker on the F10 map.

_AddChief.description: Add a chief that monitors this zone. Chief will be informed about capturing etc.

_AddMission.description: Add an entry to the OpsZone mission table

_GetMissions.description: Get the OpsZone mission table. #table of #OPSZONE.MISSION entries

_FindMissions.description: Add an entry to the OpsZone mission table.

_CleanMissionTable.description: Clean mission table from missions that are over.

New.description: Create a new PLATOON object and start the FSM.

onafterStart.description: On after Start event. Starts the FLIGHTGROUP FSM and event handlers.

New.description: Constructor

NewFromTarget.description: Constructor that automatically determines the task type based on the target.

_GetTaskTypeForTarget.description: [Internal] Determines AUFTRAG type based on the target characteristics.

CanJoinTask.description: [User] Override this function in order to implement custom logic if a player can join a task or not.

EnablePersistance.description: [User] Set this task for persistance, if persistance is enabled on the PLAYERTASKCONTROLLER instance.

_SetController.description: [Internal] Add a PLAYERTASKCONTROLLER for this task

SetCoalition.description: [User] Set a coalition side for this task

GetCoalition.description: [User] Get the coalition side for this task

GetTarget.description: [User] Get the Ops.Target#TARGET object for this task

AddFreetext.description: [USER] Add a free text description to this task.

HasFreetext.description: [USER] Query if a task has free text description.

HasFreetextTTS.description: [USER] Query if a task has free text TTS description.

SetSubType.description: [USER] Set a task sub type description to this task.

SetCanSmoke.description: [USER] Set if a task can have a smoke marker.

SetShowThreatDetails.description: [USER] Set if a task can show threat details.

GetSubType.description: [USER] Get task sub type description from this task.

GetFreetext.description: [USER] Get the free text description from this task.

AddFreetextTTS.description: [USER] Add a free text description for TTS to this task.

GetFreetextTTS.description: [USER] Get the free text TTS description from this task.

SetMenuName.description: [USER] Add a short free text description for the menu entry of this task.

AddStaticObjectSuccessCondition.description: [USER] Adds task success condition for dead STATIC, SET_STATIC, SCENERY or SET_SCENERY target object.

AddReconSuccessCondition.description: [USER] Adds task success condition for AUFTRAG.Type.RECON when a client is at a certain LOS distance from the target.

FindCarrier.description: Find a free Carrier within a radius.

SetCombatRadius.description: Enable/Disable unboarding of cargo (infantry) when enemies are nearby (to help defend the carrier).

_Pickup.description: Pickup task function. Triggers Load event.

_Deploy.description: Deploy task function. Triggers Unload event.

New.description: Creates a new AI_CARGO_HELICOPTER object.

SetLandingSpeedAndHeight.description: Set landingspeed and -height for helicopter landings. Adjust after tracing if your helis get stuck after landing.

New.description: Creates a new AI_CARGO_AIRPLANE object.

SetCarrier.description: Set the Carrier (controllable). Also initializes events for carrier and defines the coalition.

FindCarrier.description: Find a free Carrier within a range.

onafterLanded.description: On after "Landed" event. Called on engine shutdown and initiates the pickup mission or unloading event.

onafterPickup.description: On after "Pickup" event. Routes transport to pickup airbase.

onafterDeploy.description: On after Depoly event. Routes plane to the airbase where the troops are deployed.

onafterUnload.description: On after Unload event. Cargo is beeing unloaded, i.e. the unboarding process is started.

Route.description: Route the airplane from one airport or it's current position to another airbase.

onafterHome.description: On after Home event. Aircraft will be routed to their home base.

New.description: Creates a new AI_CARGO_SHIP object.

FindCarrier.description: FInd a free Carrier within a radius

_Pickup.description: Check if cargo ship is alive and trigger Load event

_Deploy.description: Check if cargo ship is alive and trigger Unload event. Good time to remind people that Lua is case sensitive and Unload != UnLoad

SetPickupSpeed.description: Set the speed or randomizes the speed in km/h to pickup the cargo.

SetDeploySpeed.description: Sets or randomizes the speed in km/h to deploy the cargo.

SetPickupHeight.description: Set the height or randomizes the height in meters to fly and pickup the cargo. The default height is 200 meters.

SetDeployHeight.description: Set the height or randomizes the height in meters to fly and deploy the cargo.  The default height is 200 meters.

onafterMonitor.description: The Start trigger event, which actually takes action at the specified time interval.

onafterStart.description: Start Asynchronous Trigger for AI_CARGO_DISPATCHER

onafterTransport.description: Make a Carrier run for a cargo deploy action after the cargo has been loaded, by default.

SetCombatRadius.description: Enable/Disable unboarding of cargo (infantry) when enemies are nearby (to help defend the carrier).

SetOffRoad.description: Set whether the carrier will *not* use roads to *pickup* and *deploy* the cargo.

SetPickupOffRoad.description: Set whether the carrier will *not* use roads to *pickup* the cargo.

SetDeployOffRoad.description: Set whether the carrier will *not* use roads to *deploy* the cargo.

New.description: Creates a new instance of SHAPE_BASE.

FindOnMap.description: Finds a shape on the map by its name.

Offset.description: Offsets the shape to a new position.

GetName.description: Gets the name of the shape.

GetCenterVec2.description: Gets the center position of the shape.

GetCenterCoordinate.description: Gets the center coordinate of the shape.

GetCoordinate.description: Gets the coordinate of the shape.

ContainsPoint.description: Checks if a point is contained within the shape.

ContainsUnit.description: Checks if a unit is contained within the shape.

ContainsAnyOfGroup.description: Checks if any unit of a group is contained within the shape.

ContainsAllOfGroup.description: Checks if all units of a group are contained within the shape.

FindOnMap.description: Finds a circle on the map by its name. The circle must have been added in the Mission Editor

Find.description: Finds a circle by its name in the database.

New.description: Creates a new circle from a center point and a radius.

GetRadius.description: Gets the radius of the circle.

ContainsPoint.description: Checks if a point is contained within the circle.

PointInSector.description: Checks if a point is contained within a sector of the circle. The start and end sector need to be clockwise

UnitInSector.description: Checks if a unit is contained within a sector of the circle. The start and end sector need to be clockwise

AnyOfGroupInSector.description: Checks if any unit of a group is contained within a sector of the circle. The start and end sector need to be clockwise

AllOfGroupInSector.description: Checks if all units of a group are contained within a sector of the circle. The start and end sector need to be clockwise

UnitInRadius.description: Checks if a unit is contained within a radius of the circle.

AnyOfGroupInRadius.description: Checks if any unit of a group is contained within a radius of the circle.

AllOfGroupInRadius.description: Checks if all units of a group are contained within a radius of the circle.

GetRandomVec2.description: Returns a random Vec2 within the circle.

GetRandomVec2OnBorder.description: Returns a random Vec2 on the border of the circle.

GetBoundingBox.description: Calculates the bounding box of the circle. The bounding box is the smallest rectangle that contains the circle.

FindOnMap.description: Finds a line on the map by its name. The line must be drawn in the Mission Editor

Find.description: Finds a line by its name in the database.

New.description: Creates a new line from two points.

NewFromCircle.description: Creates a new line from a circle.

Coordinates.description: Gets the coordinates of the line.

GetStartCoordinate.description: Gets the start coordinate of the line. The start coordinate is the first point of the line.

GetEndCoordinate.description: Gets the end coordinate of the line. The end coordinate is the last point of the line.

GetStartPoint.description: Gets the start point of the line. The start point is the first point of the line.

GetEndPoint.description: Gets the end point of the line. The end point is the last point of the line.

GetLength.description: Gets the length of the line.

GetHeading.description: Gets the heading of the line.

GetIndividualParts.description: Return each part of the line as a new line

GetPointsInbetween.description: Gets a number of points in between the start and end points of the line.

GetCoordinatesInBetween.description: Gets a number of points in between the start and end points of the line.

GetPointsBetweenAsSineWave.description: Gets a number of points on a sine wave between the start and end points of the line.

GetBoundingBox.description: Calculates the bounding box of the line. The bounding box is the smallest rectangle that contains the line.

Draw.description: Draws the line on the map.

RemoveDraw.description: Removes the drawing of the line from the map.

FindOnMap.description: Finds an oval on the map by its name. The oval must be drawn on the map.

Find.description: Finds an oval by its name in the database.

New.description: Creates a new oval from a center point, major axis, minor axis, and angle.

GetMajorAxis.description: Gets the major axis of the oval.

GetMinorAxis.description: Gets the minor axis of the oval.

GetAngle.description: Gets the angle of the oval.

SetMajorAxis.description: Sets the major axis of the oval.

SetMinorAxis.description: Sets the minor axis of the oval.

SetAngle.description: Sets the angle of the oval.

ContainsPoint.description: Checks if a point is contained within the oval.

GetRandomVec2.description: Returns a random Vec2 within the oval.

GetBoundingBox.description: Calculates the bounding box of the oval. The bounding box is the smallest rectangle that contains the oval.

Draw.description: Draws the oval on the map, for debugging

RemoveDraw.description: Removes the drawing of the oval from the map

FindOnMap.description: Finds a polygon on the map by its name. The polygon must be added in the mission editor.

FromZone.description: Creates a polygon from a zone. The zone must be defined in the mission.

Find.description: Finds a polygon by its name in the database.

New.description: Creates a new polygon from a list of points. Each point is a table with 'x' and 'y' fields.

GetCentroid.description: Calculates the centroid of the polygon. The centroid is the average of the 'x' and 'y' coordinates of the points.

GetCoordinates.description: Returns the coordinates of the polygon. Each coordinate is a COORDINATE object.

GetStartCoordinate.description: Returns the start coordinate of the polygon. The start coordinate is the first point of the polygon.

GetEndCoordinate.description: Returns the end coordinate of the polygon. The end coordinate is the last point of the polygon.

GetStartPoint.description: Returns the start point of the polygon. The start point is the first point of the polygon.

GetEndPoint.description: Returns the end point of the polygon. The end point is the last point of the polygon.

GetPoints.description: Returns the points of the polygon. Each point is a table with 'x' and 'y' fields.

GetSurfaceArea.description: Calculates the surface area of the polygon. The surface area is the sum of the areas of the triangles that make up the polygon.

GetBoundingBox.description: Calculates the bounding box of the polygon. The bounding box is the smallest rectangle that contains the polygon.

Triangulate.description: Triangulates the polygon. The polygon is divided into triangles.

GetRandomVec2.description: Returns a random Vec2 within the polygon. The Vec2 is weighted by the areas of the triangles that make up the polygon.

GetRandomNonWeightedVec2.description: Returns a random non-weighted Vec2 within the polygon. The Vec2 is chosen from one of the triangles that make up the polygon.

ContainsPoint.description: Checks if a point is contained within the polygon. The point is a table with 'x' and 'y' fields.

Draw.description: Draws the polygon on the map. The polygon can be drawn with or without inner triangles. This is just for debugging

RemoveDraw.description: Removes the drawing of the polygon from the map.

__CalculateSurfaceArea.description: Calculates the surface area of the polygon. The surface area is the sum of the areas of the triangles that make up the polygon.

New.description: Creates a new triangle from three points. The points need to be given as Vec2s

ContainsPoint.description: Checks if a point is contained within the triangle.

GetRandomVec2.description: Returns a random Vec2 within the triangle.

Draw.description: Draws the triangle on the map, just for debugging

RemoveDraw.description: Removes the drawing of the triangle from the map.

New.description: Create a new RADIO Object. This doesn't broadcast a transmission, though, use @{#RADIO.Broadcast} to actually broadcast.

SetFileName.description: Set the file name for the radio transmission.

SetFrequency.description: Set the frequency for the radio transmission.

SetModulation.description: Set AM or FM modulation of the radio transmitter. Set this before you set a frequency!

SetPower.description: Check validity of the power passed and sets RADIO.Power

SetLoop.description: Set message looping on or off.

SetSubtitle.description: Check validity of the subtitle and the subtitleDuration  passed and sets RADIO.subtitle and RADIO.subtitleDuration

NewGenericTransmission.description: Create a new transmission, that is to say, populate the RADIO with relevant data

NewUnitTransmission.description: Create a new transmission, that is to say, populate the RADIO with relevant data

New.description: Create a new RADIOQUEUE object for a given radio frequency/modulation.

Stop.description: Stop the radio queue. Stop scheduler and delete queue.

SetSenderCoordinate.description: Set coordinate from where the transmission is broadcasted.

SetSenderUnitName.description: Set name of unit or static from which transmissions are made.

SetRadioPower.description: Set radio power. Note that this only applies if no relay unit is used.

AddTransmission.description: Add a transmission to the radio queue.

NewTransmission.description: Create a new transmission and add it to the radio queue.

AddSoundFile.description: Add a SOUNDFILE to the radio queue.

AddSoundText.description: Add a SOUNDTEXT to the radio queue.

Number2Transmission.description: Convert a number (as string) into a radio transmission.

_CheckRadioQueue.description: Check radio queue for transmissions to be broadcasted.

_GetRadioSender.description: Get unit from which we want to transmit a radio message. This has to be an aircraft for subtitles to work.

_GetRadioSenderCoord.description: Get unit from which we want to transmit a radio message. This has to be an aircraft or ground unit for subtitles to work.

New.description: Create a new RADIOSPEECH object for a given radio frequency/modulation.

AddSentenceToSpeech.description: Add Sentence to the Speech collection.

BuildTree.description: Build the tree structure based on the language words, in order to find the correct sentences and to ignore incomprehensible words.

New.description: Create a new MSRS object. Required argument is the frequency and modulation.

SetBackend.description: Set backend to communicate with SRS.

SetBackendGRPC.description: Set DCS-gRPC as backend to communicate with SRS.

SetBackendSRSEXE.description: Set `DCS-SR-ExternalAudio.exe` as backend to communicate with SRS.

SetDefaultBackendGRPC.description: Set DCS-gRPC to be the default backend.

SetPath.description: Set path to SRS install directory. More precisely, path to where the `DCS-SR-ExternalAudio.exe` is located.

SetVoice.description: Set to use a specific voice. Note that this will override any gender and culture settings as a voice already has a certain gender/culture.

SetVoiceProvider.description: Set to use a specific voice for a given provider. Note that this will override any gender and culture settings.

SetVoiceWindows.description: Set to use a specific voice if Microsoft Windows' native TTS is use as provider. Note that this will override any gender and culture settings.

SetVoiceGoogle.description: Set to use a specific voice if Google is use as provider. Note that this will override any gender and culture settings.

SetVoiceAzure.description: Set to use a specific voice if Microsoft Azure is use as provider (only DCS-gRPC backend). Note that this will override any gender and culture settings.

SetVoiceAmazon.description: Set to use a specific voice if Amazon Web Service is use as provider (only DCS-gRPC backend). Note that this will override any gender and culture settings.

SetCoordinate.description: Set the coordinate from which the transmissions will be broadcasted. Note that this is only a factor if SRS has line-of-sight or distance enabled.

SetGoogle.description: [Deprecated] Use google text-to-speech credentials. Also sets Google as default TTS provider.

SetGoogleAPIKey.description: [Deprecated] Use google text-to-speech set the API key (only for DCS-gRPC).

SetProvider.description: Set provider used to generate text-to-speech.

SetProviderOptionsGoogle.description: Set provider options and credentials for Google Cloud.

SetProviderOptionsAmazon.description: Set provider options and credentials for Amazon Web Service (AWS). Only supported in combination with DCS-gRPC as backend.

SetProviderOptionsAzure.description: Set provider options and credentials for Microsoft Azure. Only supported in combination with DCS-gRPC as backend.

SetTTSProviderAzure.description: Use Microsoft Azure to provide text-to-speech. Only supported if used in combination with DCS-gRPC as backend.

SetTTSProviderAmazon.description: Use Amazon Web Service (AWS) to provide text-to-speech. Only supported if used in combination with DCS-gRPC as backend.

Help.description: Print SRS help to DCS log file.

PlaySoundFile.description: Play sound file (ogg or mp3) via SRS.

PlayTextExt.description: Play text message via MSRS with explicitly specified options.

_GetLatLongAlt.description: Get lat, long and alt from coordinate.

_GetCommand.description: Get SRS command to play sound using the `DCS-SR-ExternalAudio.exe`.

_ExecCommand.description: Execute SRS command to play sound using the `DCS-SR-ExternalAudio.exe`.

_DCSgRPCtts.description: Make DCS-gRPC API call to transmit text-to-speech over SRS.

getSpeechTime.description: Function returns estimated speech time in seconds.

New.description: Create a new MSRSQUEUE object for a given radio frequency/modulation.

AddTransmission.description: Add a transmission to the radio queue.

SetTransmitOnlyWithPlayers.description: Switch to only transmit if there are players on the server.

CalcTransmisstionDuration.description: Calculate total transmission duration of all transmission in the queue.

_CheckRadioQueue.description: Check radio queue for transmissions to be broadcasted.

New.description: The constructor takes an IDENTIFIABLE as the HQ command center.

fields.name: BirthPlace
fields.description: The birthplace enumerator is used to define where an aircraft or helicopter has spawned in association with birth events.

fields.name: VolumeType
fields.description: The volumeType enumerator defines the types of 3d geometery used within the [world.searchObjects](https://wiki.hoggitworld.com/view/DCS_func_searchObjects) function.

world.BirthPlace.description: The birthplace enumerator is used to define where an aircraft or helicopter has spawned in association with birth events.

world.VolumeType.description: The volumeType enumerator defines the types of 3d geometery used within the #world.searchObjects function.

fields.name: speedMax0
fields.description: Max speed in meters/second at zero altitude.

fields.name: speedMax10K
fields.description: Max speed in meters/second at 10k altitude.

Vec2.description: Vec2 is a 2D-vector for the ground plane as a reference plane.

Position3.description: Position is a composite structure. It consists of both coordinate vector and orientation matrix. Position3 (also known as "Pos3" for short) is a table that has following format:

fields.name: x
fields.description: Orientation component of vector pointing East.

fields.name: y
fields.description: Orientation component of vector pointing up.

fields.name: z
fields.description: Orientation component of vector pointing North.

Task.description: A task descriptor (internal structure for DCS World). See https://wiki.hoggitworld.com/view/Category:Tasks.

fields.name: flag
fields.description: enum stores weapon flags. Some of them are combination of another flags.

fields.name: GuidanceType
fields.description: enum that stores guidance methods. Available only for guided weapon (Weapon.Category.MISSILE and some Weapon.Category.BOMB).

fields.name: MissileCategory
fields.description: enum that stores missile category. Available only for missiles (Weapon.Category.MISSILE).

Weapon.flag.description: enum stores weapon flags. Some of them are combination of another flags.

fields.name: AnyUnguidedBomb
fields.description: + Penetrator + NapalmBomb + FAEBomb + ClusterBomb + Dispencer + CandleBomb + ParachuteBomb

Weapon.Category.description: Weapon.Category enum that stores weapon categories.

Weapon.GuidanceType.description: Weapon.GuidanceType enum that stores guidance methods. Available only for guided weapon (Weapon.Category.MISSILE and some Weapon.Category.BOMB).

Weapon.MissileCategory.description: Weapon.MissileCategory enum that stores missile category. Available only for missiles (Weapon.Category.MISSILE).

Weapon.WarheadType.description: Weapon.WarheadType enum that stores warhead types.

fields.name: ID
fields.description: Identifier of an airbase. It assigned to an airbase by the Mission Editor automatically. This identifier is used in AI tasks to refer an airbase that exists (spawned and not dead) or not.

fields.name: Category
fields.description: enum contains identifiers of airbase categories.

fields.name: Desc
fields.description: Airbase descriptor. Airdromes are unique and their types are unique, but helipads and ships are not always unique and may have the same type.

Airbase.Category.description: Enum contains identifiers of airbase categories.

Airbase.Desc.description: Airbase descriptor. Airdromes are unique and their types are unique, but helipads and ships are not always unique and may have the same type.

Controller.description: Controller is an object that performs A.I.-tasks. Other words controller is an instance of A.I.. Controller stores current main task, active enroute tasks and behavior options. Controller performs commands. Please, read DCS A-10C GUI Manual EN.pdf chapter "Task Planning for Unit Groups", page 91 to understand A.I. system of DCS:A-10C.

fields.name: Detection
fields.description: Enum contains identifiers of surface types.

fields.name: IRST
fields.description: Infra-red search and track detection. Numeric value 8.

fields.name: RWR
fields.description: Radar Warning Receiver detection. Numeric value 16.

fields.name: distance
fields.description: Distance to the target is known

fields.name: ID
fields.description: Identifier of an unit. It assigned to an unit by the Mission Editor automatically.

Unit.RefuelingSystem.description: Enum that stores aircraft refueling system types.

Unit.OpticType.description: Enum that stores types of optic sensors.

fields.name: speedMax0
fields.description: Distance / Time maximal TAS at ground level

fields.name: speedMax10K
fields.description: Distance / Time maximal TAS at altitude of 10 km

fields.name: riverCrossing
fields.description: can the vehicle cross a rivers

fields.name: detectionDistanceRBM
fields.description: detection distance for RCS=1m^2 in real-beam mapping mode, nil if radar doesn't support surface/land search

fields.name: detectionDistanceHRM
fields.description: detection distance for RCS=1m^2 in high-resolution mapping mode, nil if radar has no HRM

fields.name: detectionDistanceAir
fields.description: detection distance for RCS=1m^2 airborne target, nil if radar doesn't support air search

fields.name: detectionDistanceIdle
fields.description: detection of tail-on target with heat signature = 1 in upper hemisphere, engines are in idle

fields.name: ID
fields.description: Identifier of a group. It is assigned to a group by Mission Editor automatically.

fields.name: Category
fields.description: Enum contains identifiers of group types.

Group.Category.description: Enum contains identifiers of group types.

Event.description: Event structure. Note that present fields depend on type of event.

fields.name: number
fields.description: subPlace Subplace. Unknown and often just 0.

fields.name: groupID
fields.description: Group ID, *e.g.* of group that added mark point.

fields.name: DCS#Vec3
fields.description: pos Position vector, *e.g.* of mark point.
